calendar.matters:
Petiotioner Gillian Lent'S Verified Probate Code 850 Petion For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Personal Property; Declaration Of Gillian Leny In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared by zoom for Gillian Lent.

The court took note of the efforts made by the parties to serve everybody. Mrs. Heiman stated that the expense to have everyone served was almost $10,000.00, that only two parties have not been served, that notice for Nahida Khalidi was sent to a P. O. Box address and referred to the Hague Convention regarding notice to Khalida Habbas. The court stated that it believes that best efforts have been made. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Ownership is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petiotioner Gillian Lent'S Verified Probate Code 850 Petion For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Personal Property; Declaration Of Gillian Leny In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petiotioner Gillian Lent'S Verified Probate Code 850 Petion For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Personal Property; Declaration Of Gillian Leny In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Jun-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petiotioner Gillian Lent'S Verified Probate Code 850 Petion For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Personal Property; Declaration Of Gillian Leny In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petiotioner Gillian Lent'S Verified Probate Code 850 Petion For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Personal Property; Declaration Of Gillian Leny In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To May-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared by zoom for Gillian Lent (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding Mrs. Heiman having made no efforts to provide personal service on the potential heirs, most of the heirs being in non-hague convention countries, the family dynamics, the burial issue having created a hurdle in communication between the parties, etc. The 850 Petition for Order Confirming Trust Ownership, etc. is continued to May 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the court to see some effort of the parties being personally served. Mrs. Heiman is to file a declaration of due diligence by May 14, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
